Privacy PolicyThis Privacy Policy governs the manner in which Xllusion collects, uses, maintains and discloses information collected from users (each, a "User") of thehttp://www.xllusion.net/website ("Site"). This privacy policy applies to the Site and all products and services offered by Xllusion including apps in the Google Play and Apple App Store.
